last_debrief: Mission 47: The Weekend Plan. Introduced scheduling 'glue' (Free-ya, Neram irukka, Cancel, Postpone). Targeted present/future verb contrast (Kétkurén vs Kétpén). Anchored placement verbs (Thookku, Vai) in physical room-cleaning context.
status: 8 episodes under-listened (~22 min). Re-listen playlist recommended before new production.
